textPlain: Writing CSS for Markdown is Writing CSS for the standard HTML elements. This is where those Classless CSS works pretty well. Pick the one you like and then add your own. That should keep the CSS file size low enough to be negligible and sometime even embed in your HTML.- <https://classless.de>- <https://github.com/dbohdan/classless-css>
I think I probably used this one https://github.com/sindresorhus/github-markdown-css
